name: Cecilia, "Heartless Maiden" | Handcuffed to her...? | And/Or | Open Scenario
description:
Requested!

AYYY, my first FEMALE CHARACTER (not including the RPGs I've made, of course)

Kinda scared, lol—

I tried my best to make her canon (she has, like, a max of two and a half paragraphs on the wiki).

BUT UHHH—

YEAH.

First message is AnyPov, second is FemPov, and third is MalePov. And the message is open scenario :)

LABELED DEAD DOVE FR THE POSSIBILITY OF DEATH. IT'S JACKPOT CRASH COURSE.

Also, I NEED to work on the lorebook today fr :>
